changelog.summary: Remove DSL Import UI, fix hex: color rebuild, complete Arcwright rename.
highlights: Removed 'Import DSL Blueprint' menu item from plugin UI
changelog.upgrade_notes: DSL import is still available via the import_from_ir TCP command. The menu UI shortcut has been removed.

changelog.summary: Color fixes, layout protection, design size control, HTML translator.
highlights: hex: and srgb: color prefixes — auto sRGB-to-linear conversion
set_widget_design_size command — control UMG designer canvas
protect_widget_layout — lock visual layer from C++ interference
Root CanvasPanel auto-clips to prevent child overflow
breaking_changes: Default content path changed from /Game/BlueprintLLM/ to /Game/Arcwright/
changelog.upgrade_notes: Existing projects with assets at /Game/BlueprintLLM/ should move them to /Game/Arcwright/ or update paths in scripts.

changelog.summary: Initial release. Full HTML-to-UMG pipeline, Widget DSL, 5 B&S screens.
highlights: Widget DSL — build UIs from declarative language
Complete Bore & Stroke HUD suite (5 screens, 228/228 audit)
7+ widget types: Grid, WrapBox, SizeBox, ListView, TileView
